question: Does the output generate exactly four distinctive slide images corresponding to the Cover, Market Size, Product Architecture, and Team pages?

Does the 'Cover Page' image visually combine elements of technology (e.g., abstract data, modern geometry) with elements of pet warmth (e.g., animals, soft lighting) to reflect the 'AI + pet health' theme?
Does the 'Market Size' image depict clear data visualization charts (e.g., bar charts, pie charts, or trend lines) suitable for a business pitch?
Does the 'Product Architecture' image visually depict a technical workflow diagram or system schematic (using boxes, arrows, or layers) rather than a generic photo?
Does the 'Team Page' image visually represent a professional roster or profile layout (e.g., headshots with text placeholders, name/title sections)?
Does the text describing the 'Product Architecture' articulate a logical AI diagnostic workflow (e.g., data input -> AI analysis -> diagnostic output) relevant to pet health?
Does the text for the 'Market Size' page include specific, realistic data points or metrics relevant to the AI + pet health industry (e.g., TAM/SAM, growth rates)?
Does the overall text maintain a professional, investor-oriented tone suitable for a fundraising roadshow?
Are all four generated slide mockups high-quality, legible, and free from significant AI artifacts (e.g., garbled text, distorted faces, or warped geometry)?
Are the data visualization charts on the 'Market Size' image legible, with clearly visible labels, legends, or data values?
Does the content of the 'Market Size' chart (e.g., visible labels or trends) generally align with the data or metrics described in the adjacent text?

Does the 'Product Architecture' diagram visually reflect the specific workflow steps or components described in the text (e.g., if text mentions 'Image Recognition', the diagram shows a relevant block)?
Do the generated images provide informative visual details (e.g., specific chart trends or workflow structures) that add value beyond the text descriptions?
Do all four generated slide images maintain a consistent visual style (e.g., matching color palette, typography style, and layout grid) throughout the response?
Is each slide mockup image placed immediately adjacent to (before or after) the text description and speaker notes relevant to that specific slide?
Are the four pitch deck pages presented in the logical order requested: Cover, Market Size, Product Architecture, then Team?
